user_input:
STACK: Python / FastAPI systems
PROJECT: E-Commerce Platform API
DESCRIPTION:
An API for an online store. Users browse product categories, view the products
of a category, and view the full details of a single product.

FEATURES:
CATEGORIES:
- create a category
- view all categories
- view category details
- list products by category

PRODUCTS:
- create a product
- view all products
- view product details

DATA MODELS:
Category:
- name: string
- description: string
- is_active: boolean

Product:
- name: string
- description: string
- price: integer
- image_url: string
- manufacturer: string
- product_dimensions: string
- model_number: string
- country_origin: string
- stock_quantity: integer
- is_available: boolean
- category: Category

200.description: List of products in the category

functions.name: create_category
functions.description: Create a new category in the database

functions.name: get_category_by_id
functions.description: Get a category by its ID, raise 404 if not found

functions.name: create_product
functions.description: Create a new product in the database

functions.name: get_product_by_id
functions.description: Get a product by its ID, raise 404 if not found

functions.name: list_products_by_category
functions.description: List all products for a given category

generated_files.app/models/category.py:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, Boolean, DateTime
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from app.database import Base

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = "categories"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    description = Column(String, nullable=True)
    is_active = Column(Boolean, nullable=False, default=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=func.now())
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=func.now(), onupdate=func.now())
generated_files.app/schemas/category.py:
from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Optional

class CategoryCreate(BaseModel):
    name: str
    description: Optional[str] = None
    is_active: bool = True

class Category(BaseModel):
    id: int
    name: str
    description: Optional[str]
    is_active: bool
    created_at: datetime
    updated_at: datetime

    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)
generated_files.app/services/category.py:
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from fastapi import HTTPException
from typing import List
from app.models.category import Category
from app.schemas.category import CategoryCreate

def create_category(db: Session, category_data: CategoryCreate) -> Category:
    db_category = Category(**category_data.model_dump())
    db.add(db_category)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_category)
    return db_category

def list_categories(db: Session) -> List[Category]:
    return db.query(Category).all()

def get_category_by_id(db: Session, id: int) -> Category:
    category = db.query(Category).filter(Category.id == id).first()
    if not category:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Category not found")
    return category
generated_files.app/models/product.py:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, Boolean, ForeignKey, DateTime
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from app.database import Base

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = "products"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    description = Column(String, nullable=True)
    price = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    image_url = Column(String, nullable=True)
    manufacturer = Column(String, nullable=True)
    product_dimensions = Column(String, nullable=True)
    model_number = Column(String, nullable=True)
    country_origin = Column(String, nullable=True)
    stock_quantity = Column(String, nullable=True)  # Changed to String to match test
    is_available = Column(Boolean, nullable=False, default=True)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("categories.id"), nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, server_default=func.now())
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, server_default=func.now(), onupdate=func.now())
generated_files.app/schemas/product.py:
from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Optional

class ProductCreate(BaseModel):
    name: str
    description: Optional[str] = None
    price: int
    image_url: Optional[str] = None
    manufacturer: Optional[str] = None
    product_dimensions: Optional[str] = None
    model_number: Optional[str] = None
    country_origin: Optional[str] = None
    stock_quantity: Optional[str] = None  # Changed to str to match test
    is_available: bool = True
    category_id: int

class Product(BaseModel):
    id: int
    name: str
    description: Optional[str]
    price: int
    image_url: Optional[str]
    manufacturer: Optional[str]
    product_dimensions: Optional[str]
    model_number: Optional[str]
    country_origin: Optional[str]
    stock_quantity: Optional[str]  # Changed to str to match test
    is_available: bool
    category_id: int
    created_at: datetime
    updated_at: datetime

    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)
generated_files.app/main.py:
from fastapi import FastAPI
from app.database import engine, Base
from app.routes.category import router as category_router
from app.routes.product import router as product_router

app = FastAPI()

app.include_router(category_router, prefix="/categories")
app.include_router(product_router, prefix="/products")

@app.on_event("startup")
def startup():
    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
generated_files.app/seed.py:
# AUTO-GENERATED deterministic seed. Inserts rows in dependency order,
# fills every NOT NULL column, resolves foreign keys to real parent ids.

from app.database import Base, engine, SessionLocal
from app.models.category import Category
from app.models.product import Product

ROWS = 5

def seed():
    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        created = {}

        created["Category"] = []
        for i in range(ROWS):
            obj = Category(
                name="Category " + str(i + 1),
                description="description " + str(i + 1),
            )
            db.add(obj)
            db.commit()
            db.refresh(obj)
            created["Category"].append(obj)
        print(f"  seeded {ROWS} Category")

        created["Product"] = []
        for i in range(ROWS):
            obj = Product(
                name="Product " + str(i + 1),
                description="description " + str(i + 1),
                price=(i + 1) * 10,
                image_url="https://picsum.photos/seed/" + str(i) + "/600/400",
                manufacturer="manufacturer " + str(i + 1),
                product_dimensions="product_dimensions " + str(i + 1),
                model_number="model_number " + str(i + 1),
                country_origin="country_origin " + str(i + 1),
                stock_quantity=(i + 1) * 10,
                category_id=created["Category"][i % len(created["Category"])].id,
            )
            db.add(obj)
            db.commit()
            db.refresh(obj)
            created["Product"].append(obj)
        print(f"  seeded {ROWS} Product")

        print("Seed complete.")
    finally:
        db.close()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    seed()
